title: The Earth House
description: A sustainable residence built using rammed earth and local materials, harmonizing with the tropical landscape.

title: Urban Void
description: A contemporary office space designed around an internal atrium that brings natural light into deep floor plates.

title: Silence Pavilion
description: A public pavilion designed for contemplation, featuring a series of concrete fins that play with light and shadow.

title: Canvas Studio
description: A minimalist art studio transformed from an old industrial warehouse, prioritizing neutral surfaces and northern light.
